Woj Board

Welcome back, Woj.

How to use
1
Start with Today's 5
Curated from your Top 50 with diverse companies. Highest priority.
2
Open a role
Notes → Day-to-day → Match → Glassdoor → Cover letter playbook.
3
Apply / Save / Pass
Apply opens + logs. Pass with reason · the board learns.
4
Track in In Flight
Move-to ▾ · Screen → Onsite → Offer. Or rejection states.
5
📊 Spreadsheet
Export 500 visible roles as CSV with links + comp + score.
6
📥 Sync weekly
Saves history · next sweep reads it · board learns patterns.
Today's 5
